name: BGSF, INC.
summary: Part I . Overview and History BGSF, Inc. (BGSF, we, or the Company) is a leading national provider of staffing and workforce solutions for the Property Management industry. We operate primarily within the U.S. through our Property Management segment, which provides maintenance and office field talent across 44 of the states and D.C. to property management companies responsible for the apartment communities and commercial buildings day to day operations.
